languages.text: "Малая цена за исполнение мечты, не находите?" {n}Себериан проводит пальцами по лицу, и от этого прикосновения вы слышите тихий звон металла.{/n} "В погоне за далекими звездами и новыми открытиями я многое потерял. Мое лицо, это тело — все это лишь то, что бросается в глаза. Но я ни о чем не жалею, {name}, и будь у меня второй шанс, охотно пожертвовал бы всем вновь ради новых свершений. Уверен, вам это знакомо: бежать наперегонки со смертью и ускользать в последний момент — нет чувства лучше этого, верно?"

"A small price to pay to achieve a dream, don't you think?" {n}Seberian runs his fingers across his face, and at that touch you hear the soft chime of metal.{/n} "In the pursuit of distant stars and new discoveries, I have lost much. My face, this body... these are just what is most apparent. Yet I regret nothing, {name}. And were I granted a second chance for fresh achievements, I would gladly sacrifice everything once more. I am certain you can relate: to race against death and escape at the last moment... there is no greater feeling, is there?"
languages.original_text: "Малая цена за исполнение мечты, не находите?" {n}Себериан проводит пальцами по лицу, и от этого прикосновения вы слышите тихий звон металла.{/n} "В погоне за далекими звездами и новыми открытиями я многое потерял. Мое лицо, это тело — все это лишь то, что бросается в глаза. Но я ни о чем не жалею, {name}, и будь у меня второй шанс, охотно пожертвовал бы всем вновь ради новых свершений. Уверен, вам это знакомо: бежать наперегонки со смертью и ускользать в последний момент — нет чувства лучше этого, верно?"

traits.locale_text: "A small price for the fulfilment of a dream, do you not think?" {n}Seberian runs his fingers across his face, and at that touch you hear the soft ring of metal.{/n} "In the pursuit of distant stars and new discoveries, I have lost much. My face, this body... these are merely what is most apparent. Yet I regret nothing, {name}. And were I granted a second chance, I would gladly sacrifice everything once more for new achievements. I am certain you can relate: to race against death and slip away at the last moment... there is no finer feeling, is there?"

My face, this body... these are just what is most apparent. Yet I regret nothing, {name}. And were I granted a second chance for fresh achievements, I would gladly sacrifice everything once more. languages.text: "Ein geringer Preis, um einen Traum zu verwirklichen, findet Ihr nicht?" {n}Als sich Seberian mit seinen Fingern über das Gesicht fährt, hörst du den sanften Klang von Metall.{/n} "Auf der Suche nach fernen Sternen und neuen Entdeckungen habe ich viel verloren. Mein Gesicht, dieser Körper ... das sind nur die offensichtlichen Dinge. Und doch bereue ich nichts, {name}. Bekäme ich eine zweite Chance auf frische Erfolge, würde ich mit Freuden erneut alles opfern. Ich bin sicher, Ihr wisst, wovon ich spreche. Dem Tod in letzter Sekunde zu entkommen ... es gibt kein schöneres Gefühl, oder?"
languages.original_text: "A small price to pay to achieve a dream, don't you think?" {n}Seberian runs his fingers across his face, and at that touch you hear the soft chime of metal.{/n} "In the pursuit of distant stars and new discoveries, I have lost much. My face, this body... these are just what is most apparent. Yet I regret nothing, {name}. And were I granted a second chance for fresh achievements, I would gladly sacrifice everything once more. I am certain you can relate: to race against death and escape at the last moment... there is no greater feeling, is there?"

Mein Gesicht, dieser Körper ... das sind nur die offensichtlichen Dinge. Und doch bereue ich nichts, {name}. Bekäme ich eine zweite Chance auf frische Erfolge, würde ich mit Freuden erneut alles opfern. Ich bin sicher, Ihr wisst, wovon ich spreche. Dem Tod in letzter Sekunde zu entkommen ... es gibt kein schöneres Gefühl, oder?"

languages.text: « C'est un maigre prix à payer pour réaliser un rêve, vous ne croyez pas ? » {n}Seberian laisse courir ses doigts sur son visage, et au contact, vous entendez le tintement délicat du métal.{/n} « En courant après les étoiles et les découvertes, j'ai énormément perdu. Mon visage, ce corps... Ce ne sont que les éléments les plus apparents. Pourtant, je ne regrette rien, {name}. Et si on me donnait une chance de repartir de zéro, je n'aurais aucun mal à tout sacrifier à nouveau. Vous me comprenez, j'en suis sûr : affronter la mort et lui échapper au dernier moment... C'est le meilleur sentiment au monde, n'est-ce pas ? »
languages.original_text: "A small price to pay to achieve a dream, don't you think?" {n}Seberian runs his fingers across his face, and at that touch you hear the soft chime of metal.{/n} "In the pursuit of distant stars and new discoveries, I have lost much. My face, this body... these are just what is most apparent. Yet I regret nothing, {name}. And were I granted a second chance for fresh achievements, I would gladly sacrifice everything once more. I am certain you can relate: to race against death and escape at the last moment... there is no greater feeling, is there?"

Mon visage, ce corps... Ce ne sont que les éléments les plus apparents. Pourtant, je ne regrette rien, {name}. Et si on me donnait une chance de repartir de zéro, je n'aurais aucun mal à tout sacrifier à nouveau. Vous me comprenez, j'en suis sûr : affronter la mort et lui échapper au dernier moment... C'est le meilleur sentiment au monde, n'est-ce pas ? »

languages.text: «Un pequeño precio para un sueño tan grande, ¿no cree?». {n}Seberian se lleva los dedos a la cara y oyes un leve tintineo metálico.{/n} «En mi búsqueda de estrellas lejanas y grandes descubrimientos, he sacrificado mucho. Mi cara y mi cuerpo... son solo la parte más aparente. Y, sin embargo, no me arrepiento de nada, {name}. Si me ofrecieran una segunda oportunidad con nuevas proezas, lo sacrificaría todo otra vez sin dudar. Seguro que lo comprende: correr contra la muerte y escapar en el último momento... No hay nada igual, ¿verdad?».
languages.original_text: "A small price to pay to achieve a dream, don't you think?" {n}Seberian runs his fingers across his face, and at that touch you hear the soft chime of metal.{/n} "In the pursuit of distant stars and new discoveries, I have lost much. My face, this body... these are just what is most apparent. Yet I regret nothing, {name}. And were I granted a second chance for fresh achievements, I would gladly sacrifice everything once more. I am certain you can relate: to race against death and escape at the last moment... there is no greater feeling, is there?"

traits.locale_text: «Un pequeño precio para un sueño tan grande, ¿no cree?». {n}Seberian se lleva los dedos a la cara y oyes un leve tintineo metálico.{/n} «En mi búsqueda de estrellas lejanas y grandes descubrimientos, he sacrificado mucho. Mi cara y mi cuerpo... son solo la parte más aparente. Y, sin embargo, no me arrepiento de nada, {name}. Si me ofrecieran una segunda oportunidad con nuevas proezas, lo sacrificaría todo otra vez sin dudar. Seguro que lo comprende: correr contra la muerte y escapar en el último momento... No hay nada igual, ¿verdad?».

languages.text: "Bir hayale ulaşmak için ödenecek küçük bir bedel, sence de öyle değil mi?" {n}Seberian, parmaklarını yüzünde gezdiriyor. Dokunuşuyla metalin hafif çınlamasını duyuyorsun.{/n} "Uzak yıldızların ve yeni keşiflerin peşinde çok şey kaybettim. Yüzüm, bu beden... Bunlar sadece en belirgin olanlar. Yine de hiçbir şeyden pişman değilim {name}. Bana yeni başarılar için ikinci bir şans verilseydi her şeyi bir kez daha feda ederdim. Eminim beni anlıyorsundur. Ölümle yarışmak ve son anda kurtulmak... Bundan daha büyük bir şey var mıdır?"
languages.original_text: "A small price to pay to achieve a dream, don't you think?" {n}Seberian runs his fingers across his face, and at that touch you hear the soft chime of metal.{/n} "In the pursuit of distant stars and new discoveries, I have lost much. My face, this body... these are just what is most apparent. Yet I regret nothing, {name}. And were I granted a second chance for fresh achievements, I would gladly sacrifice everything once more. I am certain you can relate: to race against death and escape at the last moment... there is no greater feeling, is there?"

Ölümle yarışmak ve son anda kurtulmak... Bundan daha büyük bir şey var mıdır?"

languages.text: “为了实现梦想，这点代价不算什么，不是吗？”{n}塞贝里安用手指抚过面庞，在那触碰间，你听到金属轻柔的颤鸣。{/n}“在追寻遥远星辰和全新发现的过程中，我失去了很多。我这张脸，这副身体……这些还只是最显而易见的。但我毫不后悔，{name}。倘若上天再给我一次机会去建功立业，我会再度欣然献上一切。我想你也能感同身受。与死亡竞速，在最后一刻逃出生天……世间没有比这更痛快的感觉了，对吧？”
languages.original_text: "A small price to pay to achieve a dream, don't you think?" {n}Seberian runs his fingers across his face, and at that touch you hear the soft chime of metal.{/n} "In the pursuit of distant stars and new discoveries, I have lost much. My face, this body... these are just what is most apparent. Yet I regret nothing, {name}. And were I granted a second chance for fresh achievements, I would gladly sacrifice everything once more. I am certain you can relate: to race against death and escape at the last moment... there is no greater feeling, is there?"

languages.text: 「夢を叶えるために払う小さな代償だと思わないか？」{n}シベリアは顔を撫でる。その触れ合いから金属の音がかすかに響く。{/n}「遠い星や新たな発見を求めて、私は多くのものを失った。顔、この身体…それは最も顕著なものでしかない。それでも私は何も後悔していない、{name}。もし新たな達成のために再びチャンスを与えられたなら、私は再び全てを喜んで犠牲にするだろう。君もきっとわかるだろう。死と競い、最後の瞬間で逃れる…それ以上の喜びはないだろう。」
languages.original_text: "A small price to pay to achieve a dream, don't you think?" {n}Seberian runs his fingers across his face, and at that touch you hear the soft chime of metal.{/n} "In the pursuit of distant stars and new discoveries, I have lost much. My face, this body... these are just what is most apparent. Yet I regret nothing, {name}. And were I granted a second chance for fresh achievements, I would gladly sacrifice everything once more. I am certain you can relate: to race against death and escape at the last moment... there is no greater feeling, is there?"
